reasoning: The Lean statement encodes "group of even order contains an element of order 2" directly: `[Group G] [Fintype G]` gives a finite group (implicit in "even order" — an infinite group has no even order to speak of), `Even (card G)` with `open Fintype` means `Even (Fintype.card G)`, equivalent to 2 ∣ |G|, and `∃ x : G, orderOf x = 2` says there is an element of order exactly 2. The quantifier structure, types, and conclusion match the informal claim, and the formulation mirrors the standard Mathlib Cauchy-style signature `exists_prime_orderOf_dvd_card`.
